title: Visibility Permissions for Templates?

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Is there a way to set visibility permissions for templates in monday.com? My organization creates a lot of templates, but many of them are only relevant to specific teams or workspaces.

The end goal is to to have both account-wide templates for all teams to access, and others restricted to specific teams or workspaces.

Is this is currently possible? If so, does anyone know how to set it up? Any guidance would be much appreciated!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
If a template belongs to a closed workspace, it will only visible to workspace members. However, all of the templates you have access to can be used in any workspace, regardless of the workspace they were created in originally!

I wonder if this an idea for a feature request or It doesnt appear you can even do it at enterprise level?
